title: Cucullaria ferruginea
taxonomy: Cucullaria ferruginea belongs to the family Apocynaceae. This family is a part of the order Gentianales. The classification of Cucullaria ferruginea further extends to the kingdom Plantae, phylum Magnoliophyta, and class Magnoliopsida. It is a genus of flowering plants native to tropical Africa. The classification provides insight into the evolutionary relationships and characteristics of this plant species.
